arts.ttl: Newcastle United target Marc Guehi faces FA punishment after decision in Crystal Palace draw
arts.sum: Guehi's potential punishment comes after Ipswich Town captain Sam Morsy, who is a Muslim, refused to wear the Rainbow Laces captain's armband, citing his religious beliefs. "At the same time, we respect the decision of our captain Sam Morsy, who has chosen not to wear the rainbow captain's armband due to his religious beliefs.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot not ruling out new Liverpool signings in January transfer window
arts.sum: Arne Slot says he is “so happy” with his Liverpool squad, but the club may still sign new players when the transfer window opens in January. The Reds, who are currently top of the table in both the Premier League and the Champions League, could make new additions to bolster their bid for major trophies […] The post Arne Slot not ruling out new Liverpool signings in January transfer window first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Liverpool rivalling Arsenal for ideal potential Mohamed Salah replacement
arts.sum: Liverpool and Arsenal are reportedly among the clubs still interested in the potential transfer of Athletic Bilbao winger Nico Williams. The Spain international has been superb in recent times, lighting up La Liga with his performances, whilst also really impressing as he helped his country win Euro 2024. Liverpool receive HUGE boost from star player! […] The post Liverpool rivalling Arsenal for ideal potential Mohamed Salah replacement appeared first on CaughtOffside.
